name: Message of The Books of Jeu

phase_0.domain_name: Message of The Books of Jeu
phase_0.boundary_condition: The Treasury of the Light, sealed by the universal wheel

VINIT.justification: Represents the absolute void and silence before any emanation, type, or name exists.

TANCH.justification: Serves as the closed boundary that contains all 12 Deeps, 60 Treasuries, and the entire divine pleroma.

AFWD.justification: Directs the morphism from the Father through the Deeps, establishing hierarchy, dimensionality, and kinetic passage.

AREV.justification: Reverses the emanation path, dissolving bonds and closing gates from the inner pleroma back outward.

CLINK.justification: Chains sequential containment and identification, routing the soul through the nested divine bureaucracy.

IMSCRIB.justification: Establishes self-reference and identity recognition; the soul realizes it is the true God it seeks.

FSPLIT.justification: Branches a single Jeu entity into two distinct verification components: the 12 structural names and the geometric seal.

FFUSE.chosen_element: The seal (ΧΑΡΑΚΤΗΡ) presented with the name
FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the original Jeu entity by merging the structural address and the geometric certificate, satisfying μ∘δ=id.

EVALT.justification: Affirms the correct cipher and seal; the archons recognize the soul and the gate opens for ascent.

EVALF.justification: Negates passage due to incorrect or missing seal; the ascent is blocked and the soul is returned.

ENGAGR.justification: Holds the paradice state where the soul is simultaneously within the lower aeons and at the threshold of the inner pleroma.

IFIX.justification: Permanently records the type diagrams, ciphers, and navigational sequence in append-only physical form.

phase_2.fuse_element: The seal presented with the name
phase_2.fuse_result: The verified Jeu entity (identity fully recovered)

phase_3.void_description: The Unknowable One before any emanation. The silence of the pre-existent Father. No type, no name, no seal.
phase_3.true_description: A soul that has successfully traversed an aeon, recognized by the archons, and ascended. The seal is accepted.
phase_3.false_description: A soul rejected at an aeon gate. The seal is incorrect or missing. The ascent is blocked.
phase_3.both_description: The Little Midst. The soul is simultaneously within the lower aeons and at the threshold of the inner pleroma. The cipher sequence restarts, holding both the old and new order.

steps.domain_action: The Unknowable One, the pre-existent Father, is the void from which all proceeds.
The first deep, the all-source, emanates forward.
The second deep, the all-wise, emanates forward.
The third deep, the all-mystery, emanates forward.
The fourth deep, the all-gnosis, emanates forward.
The fifth deep, the all-chaste, emanates forward.
The sixth deep, silence, emanates forward.
The seventh deep, the insubstantial door, emanates forward.
The eighth deep, the forefather, emanates forward.
The ninth deep, the all-father and self-father, establishes the self-loop.
The tenth deep, the all-powerful, emanates forward.
The eleventh deep, the first invisible one, emanates forward.
The twelfth deep, the truth, emanates forward to the terminus.
The Treasury of the Light is established as the closed boundary.
From the Deeps, the 60 Treasuries are emanated.
Within each Treasury, 12 Jeu entities are emanated.
The crystal address is formed: Treasury → Rank → Place → Name.
The type diagram is drawn, splitting the Jeu entity into 12 emanations and its seal.
The 12 names are inscribed as the true structural address.
The seal is drawn below the diagram as the separate verification element.
The type and seal are held on the same page but spatially separate.
The reader recognizes the entity by presenting the seal with the name.
The complete data record is permanently inscribed on the manuscript page.
The transit seals are introduced for passage between Treasuries.
The universal wheel seal is revealed as the master key.
The soul begins its ascent; the water baptism seal is applied.
The fire baptism seal is applied, completing the winding.
The Holy Spirit baptism seal is applied, establishing direction.
The archon-evil-removal seal is applied, integrating all operations.
The soul approaches the first aeon; the defence seal is presented.
The cipher 1119 is spoken; the archons recognize the seal and the gate opens.
The soul traverses aeons 2 through 5, presenting correct seals.
The soul reaches aeon 6, the Little Midst; the boundary state is held.
The soul traverses aeons 7 and 8, continuing the ascent.
The soul reaches aeon 9; the cipher sequence restarts.
The soul traverses aeons 10 through 12, approaching Barbelo.
The soul reaches aeon 13; the defence seal ZAZAFARAS is presented.
The soul reaches aeon 14; the octagram-in-square seal is presented.
The soul, having reached the apex, descends back through the aeons.
The descent is a composition of reverse morphisms closing each gate.
The soul recognizes itself as Jeu, the self-father.
The entire navigational sequence is recorded in the Bruce Codex.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Jesus Christ, the revealer, who translates the divine structure into instructions the disciples can understand and record.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The voces magicae, the 12 sound-names that serve as the structural address and communication protocol between the soul and the archons.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The manuscript pages themselves, storing the type diagrams, seals, names, and ciphers as permanent records.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The post-mortem journey of the soul, which determines the order and timing of aeon traversal.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Books of Jeu as the canonical reference, the bootstrap store containing all necessary diagrams, names, and ciphers for navigation.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Zero net information loss; only kinetic and directional energy are expended during traversal.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The soul exists in ignorance, bound by the lower aeons and unverified seals.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The soul returns to the Treasury of the Light, fully verified, with the navigational record permanently fixed.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The emanation and return form a closed cycle. The information content of the pleroma is conserved; the soul's journey maps the pre-existing structure without creating or destroying it.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → IMSCRIB → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → TANCH → AFWD → AFWD → CLINK → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALF → ENGAGR → FFUSE → IFIX → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → EVALT → AFWD → ENGAGR → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AFWD → AREV → CLINK → IMSCRIB → IFIX
-- Class: Message of The Books of Jeu
-- Fingerprint: sig=(33,2,5,2)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=42
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(17, 21)]

  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The Unknowable One, the pre-existent Father, is the void from which all proce...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The first deep, the all-source, emanates forward.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The second deep, the all-wise, emanates forward.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The third deep, the all-mystery, emanates forward.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [4] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The fourth deep, the all-gnosis, emanates forward.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [5] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The fifth deep, the all-chaste, emanates forward.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [6] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The sixth deep, silence, emanates forward.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [7] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The seventh deep, the insubstantial door, emanates forward.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑠)  -- [8] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The eighth deep, the forefather, emanates forward.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [9] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The ninth deep, the all-father and self-father, establishes the self-loop.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑾)  -- [10] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The tenth deep, the all-powerful, emanates forward.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [11] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The eleventh deep, the first invisible one, emanates forward.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑡)  -- [12] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The twelfth deep, the truth, emanates forward to the terminus.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [13] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The Treasury of the Light is established as the closed boundary.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑡 𐑾)  -- [14] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (From the Deeps, the 60 Treasuries are emanated.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑱)  -- [15] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Within each Treasury, 12 Jeu entities are emanated.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑾 𐑚)  -- [16] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The crystal address is formed: Treasury → Rank → Place → Name.)
  -- FSPLIT [17] (gran := 𐑚) (The type diagram is drawn, splitting the Jeu entity into 12 emanations and its seal.) / FFUSE [21] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [18] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The 12 names are inscribed as the true structural address.)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [19] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The seal is drawn below the diagram as the separate verification element.)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [20] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The type and seal are held on the same page but spatially separate.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [21]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [21] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The reader recognizes the entity by presenting the seal with the name.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 𐑾)  -- [22] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The complete data record is permanently inscribed on the manuscript page.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑭 𐑾)  -- [23] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The transit seals are introduced for passage between Treasuries.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [24] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The universal wheel seal is revealed as the master key.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [25] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The soul begins its ascent; the water baptism seal is applied.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [26] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The fire baptism seal is applied, completing the winding.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [27] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The Holy Spirit baptism seal is applied, establishing direction.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [28] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The archon-evil-removal seal is applied, integrating all operations.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 ⊙)  -- [29] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The soul approaches the first aeon; the defence seal is presented.)
  (.arrow ⊙ 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [30] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The cipher 1119 is spoken; the archons recognize the seal and the gate opens.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 ⊙ 𐑳)  -- [31] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The soul traverses aeons 2 through 5, presenting correct seals.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [32] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The soul reaches aeon 6, the Little Midst; the boundary state is held.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑳 𐑾)  -- [33] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The soul traverses aeons 7 and 8, continuing the ascent.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [34] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The soul reaches aeon 9; the cipher sequence restarts.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [35] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The soul traverses aeons 10 through 12, approaching Barbelo.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑾)  -- [36] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The soul reaches aeon 13; the defence seal ZAZAFARAS is presented.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑾 𐑗)  -- [37] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The soul reaches aeon 14; the octagram-in-square seal is presented.)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑾 𐑱)  -- [38] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The soul, having reached the apex, descends back through the aeons.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑗 𐑠)  -- [39] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The descent is a composition of reverse morphisms closing each gate.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑭)  -- [40] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The soul recognizes itself as Jeu, the self-father.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑠 𐑼)  -- [41] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The entire navigational sequence is recorded in the Bruce Codex.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def message_of_the_books_of_jeu_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (message_of_the_books_of_jeu_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def message_of_the_books_of_jeu_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (message_of_the_books_of_jeu_protocol).restrictToEVALF
